_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of foreign disclosure policies and import/export control regulations as related to cybersecurity.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of international data transfer mechanisms under applicable regulations, including adequacy decisions, Standard Contractual Clauses, Binding Corporate Rules, Transfer Impact Assessments, and supplementary safeguards requirements.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-007 (SP, cosine: 0.593), AG-K-005 (AG, cosine: 0.553).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.1/10 (raw 0.315). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, regulations]. DCWF-only terms [control, cybersecurity, disclosure, export, foreign, import] vs WIDAI-only terms [adequacy, applicable, assessments, binding, clauses, contractual] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.888, R=0.854). P exceeds R by 0.034 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of foreign disclosure policies and import/export control regulations a" and "Knowledge of international data transfer mechanisms under applicable regulations" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.604 > STS 0.315 (gap +0.289). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, regulations] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.8%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, regulations]. DCWF-only: [control, cybersecurity, disclosure, export, foreign, import]. WIDAI-only: [adequacy, applicable, assessments, binding, clauses, contractual].
